title: Wire Brushes Cup Wheels 60PCS Coated Wire Brush Set with 1/4-Inch Shank Brush Kit for Dremel Rotary Tools Polishing Accessories for Rust Removal, Stripping and Abrasive Drill Attachment
features: HUGE ASSORTMENT FOR MANY TYPES OF POLISHING - Includes an 60-piece set of wire brush drill attachments. These wire brushes do a good job removing rust, paint, burrs, and corrosion such as metals and wood, from broad flat surfaces, small areas, corners, and screw and bolt heads. Bulk quantity for any job, won't let you down
1/8" SHANK FITS MOST DRILLS - Permanently attached 1/8" shank.4500 R.P.M MAX. This wire wheel brushes kit is essential in any metal fabrication shop or garage—pretty good value
CONVENIENT, EASY TO USE - Our wire brushes are valuable. You will love the variety of heads! They perform exceptionally well and are very helpful when working on different projects around the house

WIDE APPLICATION - Roughening, planing, deburring, edge honing, structuring, descaling, paint stripping, weld seams, grinding, finishing, polishing, and surface treatment of metals, cast steel, non-ferrous metals, steel, softwood, and hand wood materials. The variety of brushes in our box is terrific and works well with your drill

WHAT YOU GET - Always wear safety glasses and other protective equipment when working with steel brushes. The whole wire wheel brushes set includes 20 pieces of T-shape wire wheel brushes(gold+silver), 20 pieces of pen-shape wire wheel brushes(gold+silver), and 20 pieces of bowl-shape wire wheel brushes(gold+silver). Various styles to meet your different daily uses

specifications_table.Recommended uses for product: ‎Rust Removal, Paint Removal, Deburring, Edge Honing, Polishing
